phone_presence_notes: Warm and thorough — 'miss Linda' at close and genuinely empathetic when customer described the disorganized storage situation.
top_strength: Best No Worries Damage Coverage explanation in the batch — clearly described $2,000 coverage and compared to competitors.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass only major miss — with customer moving from 5-year-old storage unit, prep speech would have been especially high-value.
